raw_consumer_statement: Submitted a credit card dispute due to the merchandise being unavailable ( scam ) through XXXX. Merchant submitted a response to my dispute that I didn't cancel the booking, when in fact there was nothing to cancel, and in which the scam was reported online through an AI chat bot wherein the chatbot informed me that I would receive an automatic refund and a 10 % coupon. This complaint is submitted against the card issuing bank as it has violated the rights afforded by the Fair Credit Billing Act.
